title: Fix a problem and add some test cases for podman run security-opt flag
body: Fix a problem for selinux check command and add 5 test cases for security-opt flag.

comments.body: I like it, fix the two issues that @TomSweeneyRedHat Points out and we can add this.

Hi @rhatdan 
Update the test case based on the comments from @TomSweeneyRedHat . But seems it failed in the CI env. It works in my test machine which are f28 and rhel7. Will try to find similar env as CI and try them again.
Tests seem green aside from known flakes on cloud podman.
@ypu Remove the SELinux checks on the seccomp and then we will merge.
@ypu Rebase also, so tests will run on f28
